tuition_2025_2026.notes: Based on full-time Iowa State graduate student residency. Costs per semester.

general_policy.tuition_assessment: Assessed at resident tuition rate for students regarding of residency status.
general_policy.responsibility: Students responsible for fees and remaining tuition not covered by assistantship.
general_policy.application: Admission application is used; no separate application required.

research_assistantships.description: Provided by major professor/faculty advisor from research grants.
research_assistantships.expectations: Perform research/related activities (20 hours/week) as directed by major professor.
research_assistantships.contingency: Satisfactory performance, degree progression, and fund availability.

teaching_assistantships.availability: Inconsistent year-to-year as HCI is a program, not a department.
teaching_assistantships.selection_process: Selected by course instructor, DOGE, and VRAC director.
teaching_assistantships.communication: Email sent to current on-campus students if openings available.
teaching_assistantships.eligibility: Not offered to newly admitted students.

ms_thesis.tuition_rate_applied: Graduate assistant tuition rate (in-state rate) for remaining tuition
ms_thesis.insurance: Single-student health insurance (includes prescription drug plan) at no charge (if appointed for at least 3 months).

phd.insurance: Single-student health insurance (includes prescription drug plan) at no charge (if appointed for at least 3 months).

scholarships.general: Students with RA/TA receive tuition scholarship (75% for MS, 100% for PhD).
scholarships.international: Scholarships for International Students database available.

on_campus_work.eligibility: All ISU students meeting job requirements.
on_campus_work.source: Student Employment Center / Online Job Board.
on_campus_work.types: Hourly positions (research, computer services, specialized fields).
on_campus_work.approval: All hourly graduate student employment requires Graduate College approval.

off_campus_work.source: Online Job Board lists positions in Ames and surrounding communities.
off_campus_work.types: Light yard work, housework, food service, cashier, child care, farm help, etc.
